heading: Acquisition
label: 698s Acquisition
notes: Amendments1994—Subsec. (b)(2)(B). substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs”.Pub. L. 103–437
amendments: Amendments1994—Subsec. (b)(2)(B). substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs”.Pub. L. 103–437

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraphs (2) and (3), the Secretary is authorized to acquire lands, waters, and interests in lands and waters within the boundaries of the Preserve by donation, purchase with donated or appropriated funds, or exchange.

children.heading: Consent of the owner
children.label: 2 Consent of the owner
children.text: The Secretary may not acquire lands, waters, or interests in lands and waters for the Preserve without the consent of the owner.

children.heading: State lands
children.label: 3 State lands
children.text: Lands, waters, and interests in lands and waters within the boundaries of the Preserve that are owned by the State of Alabama, or any political subdivision of the State, may be acquired only by donation or exchange.

children.heading: Commencement of negotiations
children.label: 1 Commencement of negotiations
children.text: Immediately after publication of a description of the boundaries of the Preserve in accordance with , the Secretary shall commence negotiations for the acquisition of the lands, waters, and interests in lands and waters within the boundaries of the Preserve.section 698q(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: C
children.text: the Committees on Appropriations of Congress.

children.heading: Acquisition deadline
children.label: 3 Acquisition deadline
children.text: The Secretary shall substantially complete the acquisition of the lands, waters, and interests in lands and waters within the Preserve, in accordance with the purposes of sections 698q to 698t of this title, not later than 2 years after , subject to the availability of funds.October 21, 1992

children.heading: Availability to owner
children.label: 1 Availability to owner
children.text: Promptly following completion of any environmental audit performed by or on behalf of the Secretary with respect to any property proposed to be acquired for the purposes of sections 698q to 698t of this title, the Secretary shall make available to the owner of the property a copy of the audit.

children.heading: Inclusion in documents transferring title
children.label: 2 Inclusion in documents transferring title
children.text: Any audit described in paragraph (1), and any environmental audit performed by the owner of the property and submitted to the Secretary prior to the date of the acquisition, shall be included as part of the documents transferring title to the property to the United States.

children.heading: Future additions
children.label: d Future additions
children.text: No lands or interest in lands may be added to the Preserve after , without specific authorization by Congress and the consent of the owner of the lands or interest.October 21, 1992
